observations: Backend pagination with offset/limit query params and total count — clean SQL implementation
Frontend SessionsPage properly fetches paginated data with fetchPage callback
Page navigation controls with Previous/Next buttons and page indicator
Buttons correctly disabled at boundaries (first/last page)
totalSessions correctly decremented on client-side delete
9 backend tests: default pagination, limit, offset, offset+limit, out-of-range, zero offset, empty DB, ordering, total independence
7 frontend tests: rendering, controls visibility, Previous disabled, Next disabled, navigation, single page, empty state
Edge cases well covered (empty DB, out-of-range offset, single page)

nonBlockingObservations.description: Backend does not validate offset/limit params (negative values would pass through to SQL). Low risk since SQLite handles it gracefully, but input validation would be more robust.
